positive: An intricate, symmetrical mandalic composition featuring stylized celestial elements like crescent moons, nebulae swirls, and glowing geometric star patterns, interwoven with highly detailed, bioluminescent flora such as stylized glowing peonies and etheric ferns. The overall style must be a sophisticated blend of art deco etching and modern linocut printmaking. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing gold, and vibrant emerald green. The composition should be centrally focused, maximizing clean silhouettes and negative space for sharp printing on apparel. Highly detailed, clean vector style, isolated on a solid background.
negative: blur, low detail, text, watermark, signature, cartoon, painting, messy, smudge, grain, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy
